entities.name: IMPROVED FALLOWS
entities.description: An agroforestry technology consisting of planting mainly legume tree/shrub species in rotation with cultivated crops

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An agricultural approach aiming for mitigation, adaptation, and productivity goals

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region where improved fallows are promoted

entities.name: LEGUME TREE/SHRUB SPECIES
entities.description: Species used in improved fallow systems to improve soil and provide biomass

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cultivated crop grown in rotation with improved fallows

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE MITIGATION
entities.description: Efforts to reduce or prevent emission of greenhouse gases

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE ADAPTATION
entities.description: Adjustments in ecological, social, or economic systems in response to actual or expected climatic stimuli

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: FERTILIZATION
entities.description: The application of nutrients to soil or plants to increase growth

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to sustain plant growth by providing essential nutrients

entities.name: NUTRIENT USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant absorbs and utilizes nutrients

entities.name: SOIL CARBON SEQUESTRATION
entities.description: The process of capturing and storing atmospheric carbon dioxide in the soil

entities.name: GREENHOUSE EMISSIONS
entities.description: The release of gases that trap heat in the atmosphere

entities.name: FODDER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The availability of forage for livestock during dry periods

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: Organic material produced by plants used for various purposes including charcoal

entities.name: CHARCOAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of converting biomass into charcoal

entities.name: SOUTHERN AND EASTERN AFRICA
entities.description: Regions where improved fallows are currently adopted

entities.name: SESBANIA SESBAN
entities.description: A legume species used in improved fallow systems

entities.name: TEPHROSIA VOGELII
entities.description: A legume species used in improved fallow systems

entities.name: CAJANUS CAJAN
entities.description: A legume species used in improved fallow systems

entities.name: LAND TENURE ISSUES
entities.description: Legal or social constraints regarding land ownership that hinder technology scaling

entities.name: SOCIAL CAPITAL
entities.description: The networks of relationships among people who live and work in a particular society

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: The genetic material of an organism, specifically improved accessions of fallow species

entities.name: SEED ORCHARDS
entities.description: Managed stands of trees used to produce high-quality seeds

entities.name: NURSERY DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of establishing facilities for growing young plants

entities.name: POLICY ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The set of laws and regulations that influence the adoption of agricultural technologies
